product_overview: InBill ERP is a local-first desktop ERP for managing sales, inventory, parties, expenses, reports, and cloud synchronization. It helps a business run billing and accounting workflows from one app while keeping data available locally and in Neon Cloud.
core_goals: Create and print sales invoices for customers or walk-in sales
Manage product inventory, pricing, and stock quantities
Track customer and supplier balances and payment activity
Review business performance through reports and analytics
Configure application settings and synchronize data to cloud storage

features.name: Billing & Invoicing
features.description: Create sales invoices, apply product selections and payment modes, and finalize sales with stock updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /billing -> Select a customer or choose a walk-in sale -> Add products to the cart -> Set the payment mode -> Generate and print the invoice
Navigate to /billing -> Select a customer or choose a walk-in sale -> Add products to the cart -> Review the calculated totals and GST -> Generate and print the invoice

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Add new products, update stock, and search the catalog by name or barcode.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Add a new product with its details -> Save the product -> See it listed in inventory
Navigate to /products -> Search for a product by name or barcode -> Open the product details -> Update the stock quantity -> Save the changes

features.name: Party Ledger
features.description: Manage customer and supplier records, record payments or collections, and review transaction history.
user_flows: Navigate to /parties -> Create a new party -> Save the party record -> See the party in the ledger list
Navigate to /parties -> Select an existing party -> Record a payment or collection -> Save the transaction -> View the updated transaction history

features.name: Cloud Synchronization
features.description: Connect the app to a Neon Cloud database and synchronize local business data.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Paste the Neon connection URL -> Start cloud synchronization -> See the sync complete status
Navigate to /settings -> Paste the Neon connection URL -> Enable background sync -> Keep using the app while synchronization remains active

features.name: Billing & Invoicing
features.description: Create sales invoices, calculate GST, and update stock

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Add, edit, and track product stock and pricing
user_interactions: Search products by name or barcode

features.name: Party Ledger
features.description: Track customer and supplier balances and payments

features.name: Cloud Synchronization
features.description: Mirror local data to Neon Cloud database

known_limitations.issue: Print preview requires Electron main process, not testable in browser
known_limitations.impact: PDF generation cannot be verified in headful browser tests
